case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS NOONAN JACK IND.DBA GRAPHIC SERVICE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NOONAN JACK IND.DBA GRAPHIC SERVICE
